description:
Select the 503A compounding pharmacy partner and execute the BAA. This is the third independent entity in the Apoth corporate structure (after Apoth Health LLC and MD Integrations).

**Scope**
- Vendor due diligence:
  - 503A (not 503B) compounding scope — compounding for individual patients on prescription.
  - State licensing in every state where Apoth's prescriber footprint is active (cross-reference T-020 state-coverage map).
  - NABP (National Association of Boards of Pharmacy) / VAWD or equivalent compliance posture.
  - SOC 2 / HIPAA posture documented; willingness to sign BAA.
  - Fulfillment capability (shipping cold-chain if any condition needs it, packaging, patient identifiers).
- BAA executed and filed in `docs/compliance/baa-register.md`.
- Pharmacy partner name + disclosure rendered on `/privacy` (replaces TODO in T-032).
- DoseSpot integration: confirm MDI's pharmacy linking routes prescriptions to this partner correctly (sandbox test in T-069).

**Acceptance**
- BAA execution date recorded.
- Pharmacy partner name appears on `/privacy` (T-032 unblocked).
- Partner is reachable in MDI's pharmacy directory (`GET /partner/pharmacies` returns it).
title: Pharmacy partner selection + BAA execution
